inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: The amount initially invested, used to calculate loss from the start.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount initially invested, used to calculate loss from the start.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başlangıçta yatırılan tutar, kaybı başlangıçtan itibaren hesaplamak için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Peak Portfolio Value
inputs.businessContext: The highest portfolio value reached before the drawdown begins.

businessContext_i18n.en: The highest portfolio value reached before the drawdown begins.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Düşüş başlamadan önce ulaşılan en yüksek portföy değeri.

inputs.label: Trough Portfolio Value
inputs.businessContext: The lowest value after the peak, marking the maximum drawdown.

businessContext_i18n.en: The lowest value after the peak, marking the maximum drawdown.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zirveden sonraki en düşük değer, maksimum düşüşü işaret eder.

inputs.label: Time to Trough
inputs.businessContext: Number of months taken from the peak to the trough, indicating drawdown speed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of months taken from the peak to the trough, indicating drawdown speed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zirveden dibe geçen ay sayısı, düşüş hızını gösterir.

inputs.label: Recovery Value (if any)
inputs.businessContext: Portfolio value at eventual recovery; set to peak if fully recovered, 0 if not.

businessContext_i18n.en: Portfolio value at eventual recovery; set to peak if fully recovered, 0 if not.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nihai toparlanmadaki portföy değeri; tamamen toparlanmışsa zirve değerine, toparlanmamışsa 0'a ayarlayın.

inputs.label: Recovery Time
inputs.businessContext: Months from trough to recovery; 0 if recovery not yet achieved.

businessContext_i18n.en: Months from trough to recovery; 0 if recovery not yet achieved.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dipten toparlanmaya kadar geçen ay sayısı; henüz toparlanma sağlanmadıysa 0.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
